cases.task: Fix the Dots OCR adapter bug in tools/mtmd/models/dots_ocr.cpp and the GGUF conversion path in convert_hf_to_gguf.py.
cases.why: Mixed C/C++ and Python repo with sparse dependency graphs, explicit converter paths, and strong opportunities for false-positive utility files.

cases.task: Review a change to extension host startup and activation ordering for blast radius, validation, and likely regression surfaces.
cases.why: Large TypeScript monorepo with high fan-in services and broad UI or extension-host blast radius.

cases.task: Trace request handling from an App Router entry point to route execution for a server-rendered page.
cases.why: Strong mixed frontend, runtime, and compiler wiring with monorepo boundaries that can leak unrelated files into a packet.

cases.task: Fix a regression where dependency injection errors surface as internal server errors instead of the expected validation response.
cases.why: Clean Python framework repo that should act as a control case for focused packets and exact validation targets.

cases.task: Build a task packet for fixing model selection persistence across backend state and frontend UI surfaces.
cases.why: Polyglot agent application repo with frontend and backend boundaries that should reward structured task packets.

cases.task: Trace a deployment rollout from API admission through controller reconciliation to pod creation.
cases.why: Large Go control-plane repo that stresses scale, orchestration, and unrelated subsystem leakage.

cases.task: Plan a focused change for improving device state refresh scheduling in an integration without widening the packet to unrelated integrations.
cases.why: Large modular Python repo with plugin-style boundaries and many similarly named files.

cases.task: Fix a regression in compiled autograd path selection between Python entry points and the C++ dispatcher.
cases.why: Extreme mixed Python and C++ stress case for noisy dependency graphs and multiple runtime layers.
